mapper.select:
select pr.*,au.name as applicantName,ru.name as reviewUserName from purchase_request pr left join user au on pr.applicant_id = au.id left join user ru on pr.review_user_id = ru.id
and pr.request_no like concat('%',#{q.requestNo},'%')
and pr.title like concat('%',#{q.title},'%')
and pr.dept like concat('%',#{q.requestNo},'%')
and pr.submit_time between #{q.submitTimeBegin} and #{q.submitTimeEnd}
and pr.status like concat('%',#{q.status},'%')
select id from purchase_request where id = #{id} and deleted = 0 for update
